title: Tv-Peluche | Tv-Nauta
body:
# Plushies inspired by ["El ultimo Tv-Nauta"](https://www.youtube.com/@Tv-Nauta)
**▼ A resource pack that adds six different Tv-Plushies (Tv-Peluches)**

**■ [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) (Fabric) or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) (Forge) Required.**

![Tv Peluches](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d9f74d75ef1ee1af8bee7080952981771f609f2.png)

**► Rename a Carved pumpkin to one of the names from the list to get them.**

![Rename](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e368dfde2e9d24418200bf5dbeea5743a778b165.png)

**▼ Plushies List ▼**

- Tv Peluche #1

![tv1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36269feb152184270135ff6ceb3b9bfa10400f86.png)

- Tv Peluche #2

![tv2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12b7e52a101585bdfa2a79700ae621fe32ef07a5.png)

- Tv Peluche #3

![tv3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbfb832f1d016035234b24410d1e7a736f97d02c.png)

- Tv Peluche #4

![tv4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/213d8a358d7eadd46ab16f6d0b750f8a007fde3d.png)

- Tv Peluche #0

![tv0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdf6fbeb5c826666c09e27989bec2a16319f1279.png)

- Tv Peluche #00

![tv00](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e57eb95217eb60e1d4a2ded795ca89c8c3db4f41.png)


**► CREDITS ◄**

Resource Pack inspired by [Mob plushies (CIT)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/mob-plushies-cit)
